SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter.model

Class Policy

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.model.Policy
public class Policy extends Object
Base class representing an Apigee Policy. Subclasses represent specific policy types with their configurations.

    Represents parameter information extracted from a policy.
